name: Odin's Eye
name_jp: オーディンの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まなこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, during each player's Standby Phase: You can target 1 "Aesir" monster you control; negate its effects until the end of this turn, and if you do, look at all cards in your opponent's hand and all Set cards they control. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.
eff: Once per turn, during each player's Standby Phase: You can target 1 "Aesir" monster you control; negate its effects until the end of this turn, and if you do, look at all cards in your opponent's hand and all Set cards they control. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.

mst: Negates the effects of your Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
